title: prangos pabularia subsp. gyrocarpa
intro: Prangos pabularia subsp. gyrocarpa is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of Pakistan, Afghanistan, and India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prangos pabularia subsp. gyrocarpa include its ability to alleviate various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory disorders, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
